title: Atomic Habits
author: James Clear
description: A practical guide to building good habits, breaking bad ones, and mastering tiny behaviors that lead to remarkable results.

title: Clean Code
author: Robert C. Martin
description: A handbook of agile software craftsmanship that teaches how to write clean, maintainable code.

title: The Pragmatic Programmer
author: Andrew Hunt & David Thomas
description: A classic guide covering software development best practices and practical programming techniques.

title: Deep Work
author: Cal Newport
description: Learn how focused work can help you achieve greater productivity in a distracted world.

title: The Alchemist
author: Paulo Coelho
description: A timeless novel about following your dreams and discovering your personal legend.

title: To Kill a Mockingbird
author: Harper Lee
description: A Pulitzer Prize-winning novel exploring justice, morality, and compassion.

title: The Hobbit
author: J. R. R. Tolkien
description: Bilbo Baggins embarks on an unforgettable journey through Middle-earth.

title: A Brief History of Time
author: Stephen Hawking
description: An accessible introduction to cosmology, black holes, and the origins of the universe.

title: The Selfish Gene
author: Richard Dawkins
description: A groundbreaking book explaining evolution through the concept of the gene.

title: Sapiens
author: Yuval Noah Harari
description: A fascinating exploration of the history and evolution of humankind.

title: Introduction to Algorithms
author: Thomas H. Cormen
description: The definitive textbook covering algorithms, data structures, and computational techniques.

title: The Little Prince
author: Antoine de Saint-Exupéry
description: A beloved classic that shares profound lessons about love, life, and human nature.
